🚀 SHARE

Blog Dashboard

📱 View on Instagram

Insta

👁 29

Chatgpt

SafeValue must use [property]=binding: Great! 😊 Here is your 30-Day English Learning Plan (simple and practical).

Follow this daily:

📖 20 minutes grammar

📝 15 minutes writing

🎧 15 minutes listening

🗣 10 minutes speaking


You can use:

English Grammar in Use

BBC Learning English

Duolingo



---

🌟 WEEK 1 – Basic Grammar & Simple Sentences

Day 1

Alphabet, vowels & consonants

Make 10 simple sentences (I am…, You are…)


Day 2

Nouns & Pronouns

Write 15 sentences using he, she, it, they


Day 3

Verbs (action words)

Write 10 daily routine sentences


Day 4

Adjectives

Describe your house or friend (10 sentences)


Day 5

Present Simple Tense

Write your daily routine


Day 6

Present Continuous (I am going)

Speak about what you are doing now


Day 7

Revision of Week 1

Speak for 2 minutes about yourself



---

🌟 WEEK 2 – Past & Future

Day 8

Past Simple (I went, I ate)

Write yesterday’s activities


Day 9

Future (will / going to)

Write your future plans


Day 10

Prepositions (in, on, at, under)

Make 15 example sentences


Day 11

Conjunctions (and, but, because)

Join sentences


Day 12

Question forms (Do you…? Did you…?)

Make 10 questions


Day 13

Practice speaking (introduce your family)


Day 14

Revision + Small test (write 20 sentences)



---

🌟 WEEK 3 – Intermediate Grammar

Day 15

Present Perfect (I have finished)


Day 16

Comparatives & Superlatives (bigger, biggest)


Day 17

Modal verbs (can, should, must)


Day 18

Passive voice (The work was done)


Day 19

Conditionals (If I study, I will pass)


Day 20

Direct & Indirect speech


Day 21

Revision + 3-minute speaking practice



---

🌟 WEEK 4 – Fluency Practice

Day 22

Learn 20 new vocabulary words


Day 23

Write a short paragraph (My Goals)


Day 24

Watch an English video & repeat sentences


Day 25

Write a short story (10–15 lines)


Day 26

Speak for 5 minutes (record yourself)


Day 27

Learn common phrases (How are you? Nice to meet you.)


Day 28

Conversation practice


Day 29

Write one full-page essay


Day 30

Final test:

Speak for 5 minutes

Write 30 sentences

Have a small conversation




---

💡 After 30 days, you will see BIG improvement if you practice daily.

If you tell me your level (beginner or basic), I can make it even easier for you 😊 (see https://g.co/ng/security#xss)
Read More →
👁 19

👁 11

cht

SafeValue must use [property]=binding: Great! 😊 Here is your 30-Day English Learning Plan (simple and practical).

Follow this daily:

📖 20 minutes grammar

📝 15 minutes writing

🎧 15 minutes listening

🗣 10 minutes speaking


You can use:

English Grammar in Use

BBC Learning English

Duolingo



---

🌟 WEEK 1 – Basic Grammar & Simple Sentences

Day 1

Alphabet, vowels & consonants

Make 10 simple sentences (I am…, You are…)


Day 2

Nouns & Pronouns

Write 15 sentences using he, she, it, they


Day 3

Verbs (action words)

Write 10 daily routine sentences


Day 4

Adjectives

Describe your house or friend (10 sentences)


Day 5

Present Simple Tense

Write your daily routine


Day 6

Present Continuous (I am going)

Speak about what you are doing now


Day 7

Revision of Week 1

Speak for 2 minutes about yourself



---

🌟 WEEK 2 – Past & Future

Day 8

Past Simple (I went, I ate)

Write yesterday’s activities


Day 9

Future (will / going to)

Write your future plans


Day 10

Prepositions (in, on, at, under)

Make 15 example sentences


Day 11

Conjunctions (and, but, because)

Join sentences


Day 12

Question forms (Do you…? Did you…?)

Make 10 questions


Day 13

Practice speaking (introduce your family)


Day 14

Revision + Small test (write 20 sentences)



---

🌟 WEEK 3 – Intermediate Grammar

Day 15

Present Perfect (I have finished)


Day 16

Comparatives & Superlatives (bigger, biggest)


Day 17

Modal verbs (can, should, must)


Day 18

Passive voice (The work was done)


Day 19

Conditionals (If I study, I will pass)


Day 20

Direct & Indirect speech


Day 21

Revision + 3-minute speaking practice



---

🌟 WEEK 4 – Fluency Practice

Day 22

Learn 20 new vocabulary words


Day 23

Write a short paragraph (My Goals)


Day 24

Watch an English video & repeat sentences


Day 25

Write a short story (10–15 lines)


Day 26

Speak for 5 minutes (record yourself)


Day 27

Learn common phrases (How are you? Nice to meet you.)


Day 28

Conversation practice


Day 29

Write one full-page essay


Day 30

Final test:

Speak for 5 minutes

Write 30 sentences

Have a small conversation




---

💡 After 30 days, you will see BIG improvement if you practice daily.

If you tell me your level (beginner or basic), I can make it even easier for you 😊 (see https://g.co/ng/security#xss)
